summary.key_theme: 儘管公司在財報表現與產品策略上展現韌性，但地緣政治引發的油價波動與市場對電動車需求的擔憂，持續壓抑股價表現。

bullish.title: General Motors (GM) Q4 Adjusted EPS Beats at $2.51 as Company Hikes Dividend 20%, Adds $6B Buyback
bullish.reason: 每股盈餘優於預期，且公司透過調升 20% 股利與 60 億美元庫藏股計畫，展現對現金流與股東回報的強大信心。

bullish.title: How Did General Motors Make the 2027 Bolt Its Most Affordable EV?
bullish.reason: 透過共享零件與 LFP 電池技術，成功將 2027 年款 Bolt 定價壓低至 28,995 美元，有助於提升在平價電動車市場的競爭力。

bullish.title: General Motors Pairs Corvette ZR1 Launch With CarBravo Used Car Push
bullish.reason: 新款 Corvette ZR1 強化了品牌高端形象，同時結合 CarBravo 二手車平台推廣，有助於擴大營收來源。

bullish.title: V2X Extends Strategic Partnership with General Motors to Deliver Advanced Technical Training Nationwide
bullish.reason: 與 V2X 延長合作關係，確保服務技師的專業培訓，有助於提升售後服務品質與客戶滿意度。

bullish.title: Why Is General Motors Betting on India's Auto Parts Market?
bullish.reason: 透過 ACDelco 品牌切入印度 120 億美元規模的售後零件市場，採取輕資產策略以獲取新興市場成長紅利。

bearish.title: Record Truck Profits, a $7 Billion EV Write Off, and a Market That Doesn’t Care
bearish.reason: 儘管卡車獲利強勁，但 70 億美元的電動車資產減記凸顯轉型成本過高，導致市場對其獲利前景持保留態度。

bearish.title: US-Iran War Oil Shock: Is Detroit's Gas-Truck Bet at Risk?
bearish.reason: 地緣政治衝突導致油價飆升至 100 美元以上，直接威脅到通用汽車依賴高油耗卡車獲利的商業模式。

bearish.title: General Motors Recalls 17,050 Buick Regal Turbo And GS Vehicles From 2012-2013 Over Rear Toe Link Fracture Risk
bearish.reason: 涉及後懸吊零件斷裂風險的召回事件，雖規模不大，但仍對品牌品質形象與潛在維修成本造成負面影響。

bearish.title: U.S. International Trade Commission Says Institutes 337 Patent Violation Investigation Into U.S. Auto Parts Distributors, Manufacturers In Taiwan And China Based On Complaint By General Motors
bearish.reason: 通用汽車發起專利侵權調查，雖是保護智慧財產權，但也反映出供應鏈零件仿冒問題嚴重，可能增加法律訴訟成本。

bearish.title: GM, Ford, Stellantis stocks fell for week ending March 6
bearish.reason: 整體汽車板塊近期走勢疲軟，反映出投資人對傳統車廠在經濟不確定性下的股價表現缺乏信心。

bearish.title: 2 Domestic Auto Stocks Worth Watching Despite Geopolitical Crisis
bearish.reason: 指出美國汽車銷售動能放緩，且電動車需求疲軟，對通用汽車的短期營收成長構成壓力。

bearish.title: Rivian Wants R2 To Accomplish Something Ford, GM Couldn't: Here's The Record It's Chasing
bearish.reason: 競爭對手 Rivian 積極挑戰產量目標，凸顯通用汽車在電動車量產規模化上正面臨新創車廠的強烈競爭。

bearish.title: Does Iran War Show Ford And GM Turned In The Wrong Direction?
bearish.reason: 質疑通用汽車在油價波動下的戰略方向，認為地緣政治風險可能導致公司轉型策略面臨修正壓力。

neutral.title: Zacks Industry Outlook Highlights General Motors and Ford
neutral.reason: 產業展望報告，僅對通用汽車與福特進行常規性分析，未提供具體買賣建議。

neutral.title: General Motors Revives Chevy Bolt EV And Reframes EV Profit Potential
neutral.reason: 報導重啟 Bolt 車型計畫，重點在於獲利模式的調整，屬於公司既定策略的執行說明。

neutral.title: GM figured out how to navigate EV uncertainty with the Chevy Bolt
neutral.reason: 針對 Bolt 車型改進的技術性分析，強調其在電動車市場不確定性下的過渡角色。

neutral.title: How Do Investors Really Feel About General Motors Co?
neutral.reason: 僅為市場情緒調查的標題，未提供具體分析內容。

neutral.title: We test drove the new Corvette. Why it's a 'bargain' at $200K
neutral.reason: 針對 Corvette ZR1 的試駕評測，屬於產品行銷性質，對股價影響有限。

neutral.title: V2X Extends Partnership With General Motors To Continue To Design, Deliver, And Evaluate Comprehensive Technical Training For All GM Service Technicians
neutral.reason: 與 V2X 合作內容與前述新聞重複，選定此篇作為補充說明，確認合作範圍包含技師培訓設計與評估。

neutral.title: Zacks Industry Outlook Highlights General Motors and Ford
neutral.reason: 與前述 Zacks 報告內容完全重複，僅作為資訊來源確認。
